hooks.command: bash -c 'DB="${HERALD_DATA_DIR:-$HOME/.herald}/herald.db"; [ -f "$DB" ] && python3 -c "import sqlite3,time; db=sqlite3.connect(\"$DB\"); r=db.execute(\"SELECT finished_at FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\").fetchone(); fresh=r and (time.time()-r[0])<86400; print(\"Herald digest ready — /news-digest to read.\") if fresh else print(\"Herald digest stale (>24h). Run /news-run to update.\")" 2>/dev/null'
